---
title: "Session 2: Make It Move & Remote Control"
subtitle: "Build the body and become the controller"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, ../slides_template/assets/sdaia.scss]
    transition: slide
    background-transition: fade
    slide-number: true
    controls: true
    progress: true
    center-title-slide: true
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-image: "../slides_template/assets/anim.svg"
      data-background-opacity: "0.08"
      data-background-size: "cover"
---

# Session 2 {.sdaia-dark background-gradient="linear-gradient(135deg, #1C355E, #00C9A7)"}

Make It Move & Remote Control 🚗🎮

## Agenda

**Phase 1: Getting It Moving**

- **Part 1** — The Danger of Motors
- **Part 2** — The Physical Build
- **Part 3** — Programming Movement

**Phase 2: Adding the Remote (IR)**

- **Part 4** — How Does a TV Remote Work?
- **Part 5** — Decoding the Remote
- **Part 6** — Mapping Buttons to Directions
- **Part 7** — Make It Drive!
- **Part 8** — Complete IR Car Code

**Phase 3: Upgrading to Bluetooth**

- **Part 9** — The Bluetooth Module
- **Part 10** — App Driving

**Phase 4: The Challenge**

- **Part 11** — Obstacle Course Challenge
- **Part 12** — Problem Patterns (Closing)

{{< include session2/part1-the-danger-of-motors.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part3-the-physical-build.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part4-coding-movement.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part1-concept.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part2-decoding.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part3-logic.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part4-driving.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part7-complete-code.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part4bt-the-bluetooth-module.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part5bt-app-driving.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part5-obstacle-and-ai.qmd >}}

{{< include session2/part6-problem-patterns.qmd >}}
